falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 rises by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong rally would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme momentum, invalidating the HOLD by signaling a potential blowoff top rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average of the S&P 500 breaks below the 50-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed bearish crossover would falsify the current HOLD, indicating a shift to a downtrend contrary to the bottom pattern assumption.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
